schema_intent: Three public-sample packets that show a sensor reading, a human field note, and a restoration repair event using one packet model.

safety_profile.notes: All device IDs, people, places, evidence pointers, and measurements are fictional training data.

location.site_label: Fictional Blue Heron Estuary training reach
location.withheld_detail: Exact coordinates omitted to keep the default fixture participant-safe.

calibration_state.notes: Fictional pre-demo ice bath check. Not a certification.

notes: Single reading may inform a receipt but cannot establish a trend.

linked_claim_or_commitment.claim_text: A single fictional morning reading was 12.4 degC at the training reach.

withdrawal_and_correction.correction_route: mark superseded and issue replacement receipt

source_device_or_person.identity_policy: fictional person; no real participant identity

location.site_label: Fictional Blue Heron Estuary training reach
location.withheld_detail: Exact location and path notes withheld to model sensitive-place handling.

measurement.value: Observer noted a clear access path, three visible foam patches, and vegetation presence not identified to species.

calibration_state.notes: Reviewer must not treat this note as species verification, compliance evidence, or trend evidence.

notes: Narrative note is useful for review but not for automated computation.

linked_claim_or_commitment.claim_text: The fictional training reach had publicly visible conditions worth a steward review.

withdrawal_and_correction.correction_route: remove public summary, tombstone receipt, and keep review log

source_device_or_person.identity_policy: fictional team; no real organizational authority

location.site_label: Fictional Blue Heron Estuary training reach
location.withheld_detail: Exact repair point omitted because this is a generic training fixture.

measurement.uncertainty: medium; event reported by fictional team and needs reviewer spot-check

calibration_state.notes: Repair log checks focus on evidence pointer, time window, and whether the public summary overclaims completion.

notes: Event can be receipted as reported maintenance.
Receipt must not claim ecological restoration success.

linked_claim_or_commitment.claim_text: Fictional training-site maintenance activity was reported for review.

withdrawal_and_correction.correction_route: mark event disputed or superseded and issue replacement receipt

acceptance_checks.criterion: Sensor readings and human observations can share one packet model.
acceptance_checks.evidence: All three packet types use the same top-level fields.

acceptance_checks.criterion: Location precision can be reduced for sensitive places.
acceptance_checks.evidence: The field note has sensitive_location_flag true and coarse_region_only public location.
Each packet exposes calibration_state and measurement.uncertainty.

acceptance_checks.criterion: Public receipts do not expose protected locations or identities.
acceptance_checks.evidence: No coordinates or real identities are included; public locations are generalized.

acceptance_checks.criterion: Records can be withdrawn, corrected, or marked not-for-computation.
acceptance_checks.evidence: Every packet includes withdrawal_and_correction; the field note is marked not_for_computation.

refusal_boundaries: Do not treat a raw sensor reading as a verified claim.
Do not publish sensitive ecological or cultural locations.
Do not infer compliance, enforcement, risk pricing, underwriting, or eligibility from these packets.
Do not assume a device owner or observer has authority to publish place-based knowledge.
Do not reuse a withdrawn, corrected, or not-for-computation packet without review.
